description: Letter fragment in Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: likely early 13th century. Mentions al-Kohen al-Maghribī who was with Ṣāfī the Alexandrian; an embroidered robe (malḥafa marqūma); selling something for 27 [dirhams?]; two dinars; Abū l-Faraj Ibn al-Rayyis; Abū l-Riḍā; the price of the bracelet (ḥadīda); and someone's mother in law. On verso jottings including a basmala in Arabic script (or possibly part of the address?). (Information in part from CUDL.)
